# agmk

> agmk (AGent Marketplace Kit) is an open-source CLI that scaffolds and manages plugin marketplaces for AI coding agents. You keep one canonical catalog (`.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`) plus your plugins under `plugins/<name>/`; agmk derives every per-agent artifact from it, and you distribute the whole thing with a plain `git push` to any Git forge.

agmk is an unofficial community tool, not affiliated with Anthropic, GitHub, OpenAI, or Cursor. MIT-licensed. Requires Node.js >= 22. Install with `npm install -g @agmkit/cli`, or run it on demand with `npx @agmkit/cli`.

## Agent support (important — often misreported)

agmk sorts target agents into three tiers. Only the first two are usable today:

- **Native (no build step):** Claude Code, GitHub Copilot. They read `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` as-is. Push the repo and it installs.
- **Generated registry (`agmk build`):** OpenAI Codex (`.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`), Cursor (`.cursor-plugin/`). agmk derives these committed registries from the canonical catalog.
- **NOT SUPPORTED YET:** Gemini, OpenCode, Windsurf, Kiro. These ids are accepted by `--agents`, but agmk only records the intent in `metadata.targets` and writes install notes. **No artifacts are generated, so a marketplace is not installable from these agents.** They have no marketplace or registry concept — they read local file trees only — so supporting them requires a different distribution model, not just another generator.

## Commands

`init` (scaffold a push-ready marketplace, or a standalone plugin with `--plugin`) · `add` (add a plugin from a built-in template, a local path, or a remote git spec) · `build` (generate the Codex/Cursor registries; `--check` fails on drift, for CI) · `sync` (reconcile the catalog with what is on disk) · `bump` (version a plugin, conventional-commit aware) · `validate` (check the catalog) · `list` (list catalog plugins)

## Docs

- [Website](https://agent-marketplace-kit.github.io/): overview, how it works, quick start, FAQ
- [What is a plugin marketplace?](https://agent-marketplace-kit.github.io/what-is-a-plugin-marketplace/): concepts — skill vs plugin vs marketplace, what a plugin contains, how each agent consumes a catalog
- [Documentation](https://agent-marketplace-kit.gitbook.io/agmk-docs): full guides and command reference
- [Target agents reference](https://agent-marketplace-kit.gitbook.io/agmk-docs/reference/target-agents): tiers, agent ids, per-agent install commands
- [Source](https://github.com/AGent-marketplace-KIT/cli): repository and README
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@agmkit/cli): releases
- [Changelog](https://github.com/AGent-marketplace-KIT/cli/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
